block_01: When trading on short timeframes, an analysis of economic news is not enough. Often there is very little time for making a decision and you need to gather all the necessary information quickly, in order not to make a mistake.
block_02: In this article, we share 3 tips on how to enhance your short-term trading analysis and be on top of things. Learn about utilizing various chart timeframes, searching for chart patterns and adjusting your indicators for short timeframes.
block_03: Read the article and start applying these steps in your trading.
